uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,by.details: In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the minted liquidity. The caller of this method must be checked to be a CLPool deployed by the canonical CLFactory.

params.amount0Owed: The amount of token0 due to the pool for the minted liquidity
params.amount1Owed: The amount of token1 due to the pool for the minted liquidity
params.data: Any data passed through by the caller via the ICLPoolActions#mint call

uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,by.notice: Called to `msg.sender` after minting liquidity to a position from ICLPool#mint.
